import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, ''src''\)

# Test model imports
from fortimonitor.models import \(
    OutageLog, OutageLogListResponse, OutageAction,
    ServerAttribute, ServerAttributeListResponse,
    ServerLog, ServerLogListResponse,
    CloudProvider, CloudProviderListResponse,
    CloudCredential, CloudCredentialListResponse,
    CloudDiscovery, CloudDiscoveryListResponse,
    CloudRegion, CloudRegionListResponse,
    CloudService, CloudServiceListResponse,
    DEMApplication, DEMApplicationListResponse,
    DEMInstance, DEMInstanceListResponse,
    CompoundService, CompoundServiceListResponse,
    AgentResourceThreshold, AgentResourceThresholdListResponse,
\)
print\(''Models OK''\)

# Test tool imports
from tools.outage_enhanced import OUTAGE_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, OUTAGE_ENHANCED_HANDLERS
print\(f''outage_enhanced: {len\(OUTAGE_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} tools''\)

from tools.maintenance_enhanced import MAINTENANCE_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, MAINTENANCE_ENHANCED_HANDLERS
print\(f''maintenance_enhanced: {len\(MAINTENANCE_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} tools''\)

from tools.server_enhanced import SERVER_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, SERVER_ENHANCED_HANDLERS
print\(f''server_enhanced: {len\(SERVER_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} tools''\)

from tools.server_groups_enhanced import SERVER_GROUPS_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, SERVER_GROUPS_ENHANCED_HANDLERS
print\(f''server_groups_enhanced: {len\(SERVER_GROUPS_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} tools''\)

from tools.templates_enhanced import TEMPLATES_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, TEMPLATES_ENHANCED_HANDLERS
print\(f''templates_enhanced: {len\(TEMPLATES_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} tools''\)

from tools.cloud import CLOUD_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, CLOUD_HANDLERS
print\(f''cloud: {len\(CLOUD_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} tools''\)

from tools.dem import DEM_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, DEM_HANDLERS
print\(f''dem: {len\(DEM_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} tools''\)

from tools.compound_services import COMPOUND_SERVICES_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, COMPOUND_SERVICES_HANDLERS
print\(f''compound_services: {len\(COMPOUND_SERVICES_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} tools''\)

total_new = sum\(len\(d\) for d in [
    OUTAGE_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, MAINTENANCE_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS,
    SERVER_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, SERVER_GROUPS_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS,
    TEMPLATES_ENHANCED_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, CLOUD_TOOL_DEFINITIONS,
    DEM_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, COMPOUND_SERVICES_TOOL_DEFINITIONS,
]\)
print\(f''Total new tools: {total_new}''\)
")

Bash(venvScriptspython.exe -c "
from src.tools.reference_data import REFERENCE_DATA_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, REFERENCE_DATA_HANDLERS

print\(f''Tool definitions: {len\(REFERENCE_DATA_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)}''\)
print\(f''Tool handlers: {len\(REFERENCE_DATA_HANDLERS\)}''\)

defn_keys = set\(REFERENCE_DATA_TOOL_DEFINITIONS.keys\(\)\)
handler_keys = set\(REFERENCE_DATA_HANDLERS.keys\(\)\)

if defn_keys == handler_keys:
    print\(''Keys match between definitions and handlers.''\)
else:
    print\(f''MISMATCH! In definitions only: {defn_keys - handler_keys}''\)
    print\(f''MISMATCH! In handlers only: {handler_keys - defn_keys}''\)

print\(\)
print\(''All tools:''\)
for name in sorted\(REFERENCE_DATA_TOOL_DEFINITIONS.keys\(\)\):
    tool = REFERENCE_DATA_TOOL_DEFINITIONS[name]\(\)
    print\(f''  {tool.name}''\)
")

Bash(venvScriptspython.exe -c "
from src.tools.fabric import FABRIC_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, FABRIC_HANDLERS
from src.tools.countermeasures import COUNTERMEASURES_TOOL_DEFINITIONS, COUNTERMEASURES_HANDLERS

print\(f''fabric.py: {len\(FABRIC_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} definitions, {len\(FABRIC_HANDLERS\)} handlers''\)
print\(f''countermeasures.py: {len\(COUNTERMEASURES_TOOL_DEFINITIONS\)} definitions, {len\(COUNTERMEASURES_HANDLERS\)} handlers''\)

fab_def_keys = set\(FABRIC_TOOL_DEFINITIONS.keys\(\)\)
fab_hdl_keys = set\(FABRIC_HANDLERS.keys\(\)\)
if fab_def_keys == fab_hdl_keys:
    print\(''fabric.py: definition/handler keys MATCH''\)
else:
    print\(f''fabric.py: MISMATCH defs={fab_def_keys - fab_hdl_keys} handlers={fab_hdl_keys - fab_def_keys}''\)

cm_def_keys = set\(COUNTERMEASURES_TOOL_DEFINITIONS.keys\(\)\)
cm_hdl_keys = set\(COUNTERMEASURES_HANDLERS.keys\(\)\)
if cm_def_keys == cm_hdl_keys:
    print\(''countermeasures.py: definition/handler keys MATCH''\)
else:
    print\(f''countermeasures.py: MISMATCH defs={cm_def_keys - cm_hdl_keys} handlers={cm_hdl_keys - cm_def_keys}''\)
")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Complete P1-P4 implementation: 241 tools, all tests passing, documentation added

- Added 16 new tool modules \(P3/P4\): contacts_enhanced, countermeasures,
  dashboards, fabric, monitoring_nodes, network_service_types,
  network_services, notifications_enhanced, onsight, reference_data,
  rotating_contacts, snmp, status_pages, users
- Patched 5 existing tool modules with P2/P3 gap closures: compound_services,
  dem, maintenance_enhanced, outage_enhanced, server_enhanced
- Updated server.py registry to include all 33 tool modules \(241 tools total\)
- Fixed legacy test files \(test_client, test_server, test_tools\) to match
  actual model interfaces \(url-based IDs, meta-based pagination\)
- Added 4 new test files: conftest, test_dict_tool_handlers, test_registry,
  test_tool_definitions \(165 tests all passing\)
- Added docs/DEVELOPER_GUIDE.md and docs/USER_GUIDE.md
- Added REMAINING_WORK_INSTRUCTIONS.md for implementation tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
